name: crystal-menu-ui component index

searchQueries: React 游戏 UI 组件库

components.name: PartyMenuShell
components.summary: Composable JRPG menu shell with navigation, primary panels, details, and footer status.
components.summaryZh: 可组合的 JRPG 菜单框架，内置导航、主面板、详情区和底部状态栏。
components.useCase: Build full RPG pause menus, party dashboards, and AI-generated game UI mockups.
components.useCaseZh: 适合制作完整 RPG 暂停菜单、队伍仪表盘和 AI 生成的游戏 UI 原型。
components.aiPrompt: Use PartyMenuShell when the screen needs navigation plus status/detail panels.
components.aiPromptZh: 当页面需要“导航 + 状态面板 + 详情面板”时，优先使用 PartyMenuShell。

components.name: EquipmentPanel
components.summary: Weapon, armor, accessory, stat delta, and orb socket panel for character builds.
components.summaryZh: 角色构筑用装备面板，覆盖武器、防具、饰品、属性变化和魔晶石孔位。
components.useCase: Show RPG equipment screens without hand-building dense glass HUD grids.
components.useCaseZh: 不用手写复杂玻璃 HUD 网格，也能呈现 RPG 装备与属性界面。
components.aiPrompt: Use EquipmentPanel for weapon slots, stat deltas, and materia-like socket layouts.
components.aiPromptZh: 生成武器槽、属性差值、魔晶石孔位布局时使用 EquipmentPanel。

components.name: MateriaGrowthTree
components.summary: AP progression card with orb tone, level pips, and locked/ready/unlocked abilities.
components.summaryZh: AP 成长卡片，包含魔晶石色调、等级刻度以及锁定/可用/已解锁能力。
components.useCase: Explain magic, skill, or upgrade progression in RPG prototypes.
components.useCaseZh: 适合表达魔法、技能、养成路线和升级进度。
components.aiPrompt: Use MateriaGrowthTree for AP growth, ability unlocks, and magic-orb progression.
components.aiPromptZh: 需要 AP 成长、能力解锁、魔晶石式进度时使用 MateriaGrowthTree。

components.name: WeaponUpgradeMatrix
components.summary: SP upgrade grid with connected nodes, selected detail, and attack/magic/support tones.
components.summaryZh: SP 武器升级矩阵，包含连接节点、选中详情和攻击/魔法/支援色调。
components.useCase: Prototype weapon upgrade systems and node-based RPG progression screens.
components.useCaseZh: 适合快速原型化武器升级、节点养成和角色成长面板。
components.aiPrompt: Use WeaponUpgradeMatrix when the UI needs connected SP upgrade nodes.
components.aiPromptZh: 当界面需要连接式 SP 升级节点时，使用 WeaponUpgradeMatrix。

components.name: BattleMenu
components.summary: Command selector for attack, magic, item, defense, and disabled battle actions.
components.summaryZh: 战斗指令选择器，覆盖攻击、魔法、道具、防御和禁用状态。
components.useCase: Create turn-based or action RPG command menus with readable selected states.
components.useCaseZh: 适合回合制或动作 RPG 的战斗命令菜单。
components.aiPrompt: Use BattleMenu for combat command lists and action selection.
components.aiPromptZh: 生成战斗命令列表和行动选择时使用 BattleMenu。

components.name: LimitGauge
components.summary: Segmented limit-style gauge with ready states, level pips, and cyan/gold/crimson tones.
components.summaryZh: 分段式极限技计量条，支持 ready 状态、等级刻度和多种战斗色调。
components.useCase: Show ultimate charge, special meter, morale, stagger, or burst readiness.
components.useCaseZh: 适合展示大招蓄力、特殊能量、士气、力竭或爆发准备状态。
components.aiPrompt: Use LimitGauge for limit break, burst meter, or special ability readiness.
components.aiPromptZh: 需要极限技、爆发条或特殊能力就绪状态时使用 LimitGauge。

components.name: DamageNumber
components.summary: Animated floating number for normal, critical, heal, magic, guard, and miss feedback.
components.summaryZh: 浮动伤害数字，支持普通、暴击、治疗、魔法、防御和 miss 等反馈。
components.useCase: Add combat feedback moments to demos, trailers, and HUD prototypes.
components.useCaseZh: 适合给 Demo、动效展示和 HUD 原型增加战斗反馈瞬间。
components.aiPrompt: Use DamageNumber for animated hit, heal, critical, or weakness feedback.
components.aiPromptZh: 需要命中、治疗、暴击、弱点等动效反馈时使用 DamageNumber。

components.name: ChapterIntroCard
components.summary: Cinematic chapter title card with location, dossier rows, and reduced-motion support.
components.summaryZh: 电影感章节标题卡，包含地点、档案行和 reduced-motion 友好动效。
components.useCase: Introduce missions, chapters, zones, and story beats in RPG interfaces.
components.useCaseZh: 适合介绍任务、章节、区域和剧情节点。
components.aiPrompt: Use ChapterIntroCard for mission intro, chapter title, or cinematic transition screens.
components.aiPromptZh: 生成任务开场、章节标题或转场画面时使用 ChapterIntroCard。

components.name: ProfileScreen
components.summary: Character profile layout for portrait, roster, stats, biography, and action commands.
components.summaryZh: 角色资料页面布局，支持头像、队伍列表、属性、简介和操作命令。
components.useCase: Build character sheets and party profile pages with consistent HUD language.
components.useCaseZh: 适合制作角色卡、队伍资料和人物详情页面。
components.aiPrompt: Use ProfileScreen for full character profile or roster-detail pages.
components.aiPromptZh: 需要完整角色资料或队伍详情页时使用 ProfileScreen。

components.name: SaveSlot
components.summary: Save/load archive row with selected, autosave, locked, empty, and metadata states.
components.summaryZh: 存档/读档条目，支持选中、自动存档、锁定、空槽和元数据状态。
components.useCase: Represent save files, checkpoint slots, campaign records, or archive lists.
components.useCaseZh: 适合表示存档文件、检查点槽位、战役记录和系统档案列表。
components.aiPrompt: Use SaveSlot for save/load rows and system archive lists.
components.aiPromptZh: 生成存档/读档行或系统档案列表时使用 SaveSlot。

rightsBoundary: Original React, TypeScript, Less, CSS, SVG, and documentation only; no official assets or affiliation claims.
